executiveSummary: Genesis Marketing Engine generated a launch-ready Marketing Pack for LumaLearn.

marketingStrategy.launchPositioning: LumaLearn launches as a premium screen-free learning brand for parents of children aged 3-5 in India.

marketingStrategy.retentionStrategy: Post-purchase activity tips and expansion-card drops.
